title: Themistoclesia valerii
intro: Themistoclesia valerii, also known as "T. valerii" or "Valeriana", is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly referred to as a species of flowering plant. The health benefits of T. valerii include its sedative and anxiolytic properties, which can help alleviate stress, anxiety, and insomnia, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of T. valerii include valepotriates, valetrate, and valerenic acid, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, T. valerii is used to make herbal teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and enhance overall well-being.
